base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mega_man_death — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1987 mega man. Death — explodes into 8 blue-particle starburst, radiating outward. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Death — explodes into 8 blue-particle starburst, radiating outward
